Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Satellite Bch

These 7 Satellite Bch restaurants pass Florida health inspections with an A grade and earn strong diner ratings — a clean kitchen and a meal people love. Sorted by rating.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • P A 94
    PAPPAGALLOS PIZZA

    Pizza 4.8★ (3284)

    Satellite Beach · Brevard County

    LITTLE PHILLIES CHEESESTEAKS
